---
title: "More about me"
---

<style>
.hero-sub {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 56px 20px 40px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fdecef 0%, #ffffff 100%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f2cbd4;
  margin-bottom: 42px;
}

.hero-sub h1 {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.hero-sub p {
  color: #555;
  max-width: 620px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  font-size: 1.05em;
}

.section {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0 auto 44px;
  font-size: 1.08em;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.section h2 {
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 8px 24px;
  margin-top: 12px;
}

.grid p {
  margin: 0;
}

.subtle {
  color: #555;
}

.footer-note {
  margin-top: 28px;
  font-size: 0.95em;
  color: #666;
  text-align: center;
}

a {
  color: #b45373;
  text-decoration: none;
}
a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}
</style>

<!-- HERO HEADER -->
<div class="hero-sub">

  <h1>More about me</h1>

  <p>
    A bit about what I enjoy outside of research including outreach and community engagement.
  </p>

</div>

<!-- PERSONAL INTERESTS -->
<div class="section">

<h2>Outside of research</h2>

<p>
I enjoy traveling, photography, salsa dancing, baking, and podcasts.
I also love cheering for my favorite teams (go blue and go Hawks),
especially Iowa women’s basketball.
</p>

<p>
I’m particularly interested in connecting academic work with the public good,
and have been involved in outreach efforts such as:
</p>

<ul>
  <li><a href="http://umich.edu/~girlswc/">Girls Who Code</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/statcom/">Statistics in the Community (Statcom)</a></li>
  <li><a href="https://community.amstat.org/iowachapter/home">ASA Iowa Chapter</a></li>
</ul>

</div>

<!-- BEYOND TYPE ONE -->
<div class="section">

<h2>Beyond Type One</h2>

<p>
I trained for my first marathon as part of the <strong>2022 Beyond Type One Run charity team</strong>,
raising awareness and resources for people living with Type 1 diabetes.
</p>

<p>
You can <a href="https://donate.beyondtype1.org/fundraiser/4021305">read more about my journey here</a>.
Living with Type 1 diabetes has shaped both my personal and academic path,
including my focus on meaningful and impactful medical research.
</p>

</div>

<!-- HIGHLIGHTS (RESTRUCTURED) -->
<div class="section">


<!-- CLEAN ENDING -->
<div class="section">

<p class="footer-note">
I occasionally share updates about conferences, coding workshops, ASA chapter activities, and thoughts on 
<a href="https://x.com/emilyk_roberts">Twitter</a>.
</p>

</div>
